Traphase is one of the most free PvP modes in existence.

It's like Dota.

shes on cam look

Aw hell
can someone explain to me how this works and why it’s good?
So you can either use it on enemy dps, which will delay all their damage until end of your next turn
Or use it on your tank (with taunt) which will make sure enemy can't burst down your tank and target other characters with cc/etc.
Finally you can use it on your own helot, which will damage her damage until the end of enemy turn, AND bypassing barrier
arachne helot is probably the most used combo right now.
